scripts.build: node scripts/apply-content-updates.mjs && npm run validate:content && node scripts/build.mjs && node scripts/build-series.mjs && node scripts/polish-listings.mjs && node scripts/seo-finalize.mjs && node scripts/validate-build-output.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx serve dist
scripts.check: node --check scripts/apply-content-updates.mjs && node scripts/apply-content-updates.mjs --check && node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --check scripts/build-series.mjs && node --check scripts/polish-listings.mjs && node --check scripts/seo-finalize.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-build-output.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-external-resources.mjs
